## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style and conventions.
- [ ] I have added or updated JSDoc comments for public APIs.
- [ ] I have not introduced new lint warnings.
- [ ] I have not committed any secrets, API keys, or `.env` files.
- [ ] I have not added new tracking files (`dist/`, `node_modules/`, `logs/`, `coverage/`, `*.local`).
